seoTitle: Forthside vs Frankford — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Forthside and Frankford. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Forthside and Frankford.
heading: Forthside vs Frankford — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Forthside, Tasmania and Frankford, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Forthside has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Frankford (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Forthside or Frankford safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Forthside has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Frankford scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Forthside scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Frankford scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Forthside or Frankford?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Forthside has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
